title: New chat landing has no turn-form
desc: On new chat landing page, turn-form (aid=turn-form) does not exist. Find prompt by locating Button '제출' and walking up to parent Group. Fallback: retry 3x then Ctrl+V + Enter (no click -- cursor already focused).
steps: On new chat: find Button '제출' -> parent Group is the input container
Fallback: Ctrl+V + Enter (do NOT click -- cursor is focused)
author: claude
